notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee singles on a ground ball to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Kody Clemens scores. Luke Keaschall scores. Throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee singles on a ground ball to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Kody Clemens scores. Luke Keaschall scores. Throwing error by first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Twins challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Jesús Sánchez grounds into a double play, third baseman Tristan Gray to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. Jesús Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs

notableEvents.label: Josh Bell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell grounds into a double play, shortstop Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Trevor Larnach out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Daulton Varsho reaches on a fielder's choice. Kazuma Okamoto to 3rd. Lenyn Sosa to 2nd. Fielding error by pitcher Anthony Banda.
